message:
test(fuzz): add slack_api_response fuzz target + register dep + bin

Wire up a new fuzz target covering the Slack connector's typed API
response surface.

fuzz/Cargo.toml:
  - Add `fcp-slack = { path = "../connectors/slack" }` to the fuzz
    crate's dependency list so the harness can reach the typed
    response payload structs.
  - Register `[[bin]] fuzz_slack_api_response` pointing at
    fuzz_targets/slack_api_response.rs (test/doc/bench=false, matching
    the rest of the cargo-fuzz binary entries).

fuzz/Cargo.lock:
  - Re-resolve to record the new fcp-slack edge under the fuzz
    package's locked dependency graph.

fuzz/fuzz_targets/slack_api_response.rs:
  - New harness driving `SlackApiResponse<T>` parsing across the
    typed payload variants exposed by `fcp_slack::types`
    (AuthTestData, ChannelListData, HistoryData, PostMessageData,
    SearchData, SocketModeOpenData, UserInfoData). Uses
    arbitrary-driven shape selection plus structured JSON wrappers
    to exercise the success/error envelope split.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
